title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sundar tries to convince Jethalal to buy a plot from his friend. Sundar, Tapu and his friends go to the beach and have a great time. Jetha accidentally gets locked inside his own storeroom.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal accidentally drops his phone into the toilet. He is horrified to realise that he has been locked in the storeroom. Daya begins to worry about Jethalal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya learns from Natu Kaka that Jethalal has left for the airport. Just as Jethalal begins to curse his luck, two thieves break into his storeroom.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The thieves threaten to harm Jethalal unless he helps them steal. Fortunately, cops arrive in time and nab the culprits. Jethalal's luck runs out when the cops mistake him for a thief.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: At the police station, Pandeyji asks the Gada family to lodge a complaint at the Khar police station. Later, Jethalal convinces the cop who arrested him to call his family to confirm that he is the owner.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal, Daya, Sundar and Tapu spot the thieves stealing from Jethalal's storeroom. They use their ingenuity to nab the culprits.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When they hear about Jethalal's ordeal, all members complain to Daya as to why she did not inform them. Jethalal is angered on seeing Sundar's friends and asks who answered the phone earlier.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide visits Jethalal's house with a gift to reward Champaklal, Daya, Tapu, and Sundar for their bravery. Later, Tapu, Jethalal, and Daya try to close Bhide's umbrella.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal wants to give Babita a lift in his umbrella when he sees her standing without an umbrella. Popatlal scolds Bhide after he sees Bhide keeps his broken umbrella near the gate.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu Sena comes up with a plan to celebrate Ganeshotsav with everyone in the Gokuldham Society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham Society's members are shocked to learn that Tapu Sena plans to bring 100 rats to the celebration for Ganeshotsav.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide encounters Kanji Lalji Mehta, who persuades him to purchase a 1000-year-old idol of Lord Ganesha.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After purchasing a unique Ganesha idol, Bhide shares the news. When society members gather to see it, they discover that Bhide used their communal fund.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham's members are upset about their fake antique. Bhide sees Paresh Rawal outside, who is there to promote his film.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide is angry that Tapu Sena is making noise during their summer vacation. Tapu Sena decides to call their parents and ask them to take them out.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sodhi's wife encourages him to keep the promise he made to their son. A friend stops by to ask him for a favour.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Roshan wants Bhide to help look for Sodhi after he disappears. Bhide takes Popatlal and Iyer to the party.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sodhi's wife threatens him to keep his promise to his son. Sodhi finds a way to keep it by lying to his wife.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sodhi meets a doctor for an X-ray after getting a bad stomach ache and learns that there is something inside his body.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone goes to the hospital to visit Sodhi after hearing the news. Roshan scolds him after learning the truth.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is furious to learn that all the mangoes were rotten, Bhide is tensed after all the complaints from his customers and tries to call Bhau Kaka, and Jethalal gets even angrier after Sunder's call.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The parents tell Tapu and his friends about the hazards of playing with a season ball. When all pleading fails, Tapu tells his friends that the struggle is not over and that he has a new plan.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal gets suspicious about Tapu's intentions. Tapu and his gang announce that they are going on a hunger strike for the cricket kit. Jethalal is sure only Champaklal can convince Tapu.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A frantic Daya and Jethalal ask Champaklal to stop the kids from going on a hunger strike. They are shocked when Champaklal refuses to oblige and instead asks them to find a way on their own.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Though the parents try different bribes, the children are still adamant about their hunger strike. However, everyone soon becomes worried when Tapu Sena faints.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu falling unconscious leaves everyone in the society on edge. Soon, things get chaotic when the media arrives to cover the strike.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: An accident with a BMW leaves Tapu Sena with more trouble than he bargained for. Soon, a bodyguard gets down from the car and starts following Tapu.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of Gokuldham society are thrilled when Bollywood superstar Salman Khan pays them a visit. Soon, they enjoy his presence and celebrate with a lot of singing and dancing.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Salman Khan grants the society members' request by dancing with them. Sodhi takes Tapu and his friends to a cricket ground.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and Daya decide to go to his friend's anniversary party at Surat. Taarak tells everyone Jethalal is not coming to the soda shop as he is out of town.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Iyer informs Popatlal that there is indeed a water problem in Gokuldham. Popatlal tries to get Bhide to fix it.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents find a piece of cloth clogging the water tank, and Champaklal volunteers to go into the tank and remove it.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents worry the bag they found in the water tank may contain a bomb. However, they find the bag filled with demonetised banknotes.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents suspect Jethalal to be the owner of the money, angering Champaklal. They vote to keep the bag of money in the society office.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Inspector Chalu Pandey comes to Gokuldham to investigate the dirty money. Bhide tells Chalu Pandey that the money might belong to Jethalal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide has a nightmare of being arrested. When Taarak cannot get in touch with Jethalal, he decides to go see him with Bhide and Iyer.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents are shocked to see the Gadas still in Gokuldham as Bhide, Popatlal, and Iyer had assumed they left to escape arrest.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal insists the bag of dirty money is not his. Later, Madhavi suggests giving the bag to the police, but Jethalal fears the police will suspect the residents.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of Gokuldham breathe a huge sigh of relief when Champaklal returns home safe. They come together to celebrate the occasion.

title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
subTitle: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Itti Si Khushi
subTitle: Anvita, a young caregiver, shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings. As she navigates her responsibilities and growing attachment to Virat, she's also supported by Sanjay, who harbours unrequited feelings for her.

title: Pushpa Impossible
subTitle: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Popatlal cannot help Babita, Jethalal becomes upset and scolds him. Baldev's search for his daughter continues.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While the cops feel increasingly pressured to find Bulbul, she cleans Popatlal's house. Popatlal is shocked when Iyer confronts him about the noises coming from his apartment.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal is upset with Bhide's relaxed attitude towards the accidents occurring in Gokuldham. Everyone tries to find a solution to this new problem.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide takes on the responsibility of ironing Madhvi's saree but finds himself in trouble after burning it in the process.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide rushes to a tailor and begs him to stitch Madhavi's torn saree immediately. Things eventually take a dramatic turn as Madhvi walks into the tailor's shop.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide heads to a mall to buy Madhavi a new saree after burning her old one by mistake. He eventually spots Madhavi at the mall and quickly hides.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide searches for matching sarees at mall boutiques. Madhavi rings him to enquire about the saree she is wearing.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide purchases a duplicate of Madhavi's saree from a store. He sneaks the duplicate saree into the house and stashes it in the wardrobe.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Madhavi's brother is welcomed warmly to the house by Bhide and his family. Everybody starts to notice that Madhavi is wearing a different saree.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide fears the worst as the tailor shows up with Madhavi's saree in hand. The tailor informs Madhavi about the matter which leaves Bhide becoming upset.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The women of Gokuldham Society hear their husbands calling them petty and make them sleep outside.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu comes up with an idea to reconcile the men and women of Gokuldham society after their big fight.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A Shanti Hawan is performed in Gokuldham society to mend the relationships between the residents.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After the feud between the men and women of Gokuldham is resolved, the residents hold a Valentine's Day event in the society.

subTitle: Gokuldham society members eagerly anticipate the Valentine's Day celebrations. Their excitement grows as they learn about Sharman Joshi and Vatsal Sheth's upcoming stage performance.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Vatsal and Sharman's challenge proves to be tougher than expected for Jethalal and Daya who fear making a romantic gesture in front of Champaklal. Further, Tapu Sena initiates a singing competition.

subTitle: After Popatlal throws out his sim card, he decides to buy a new one from Jethalal's electronics shop.

subTitle: Popatal is excited after meeting a beautiful girl. He keeps daydreaming that he has married her and brought her home.

subTitle: In the hope of luring customers during cricket season, Abdul buys a new TV.

subTitle: Babita is harassed on her phone by an unknown caller, while Iyer goes to Taarak.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After Taarak's call, Jethalal realises that Iyer thinks he is Babita's mysterious caller. Iyer follows Jethalal, looking for an opportunity to get his hands on Jethalal's second phone.

subTitle: Unaware that Popatlal is the mysterious caller, the ladies hatch a plan to trap him. Popatlal is elated to finally have a date with his new crush.

subTitle: At the restaurant, everyone beats the mysterious caller. They are shocked to learn that the caller is Popatlal.

subTitle: When Champaklal sees a shadow in Popatlal's window, Daya comes up with a plan to learn more about it. Popatlal is shocked to see Jethalal and Daya at his door in the middle of the night.

subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The society residents protest when Inspector Pandey tries to take Champaklal to the hospital. The police set out to locate Popatlal.

subTitle: Inspector Pandey sets out to locate and apprehend Popatlal and decides to search for him in every place he could have visited.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Inspector Pandey along with the inhabitants of Gokuldham colony are actively searching for Popatlal, but they are having a hard time finding him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While inspector Pandey continues his search for Popatlal in the colony, Popatlal hides inside Bhide's house, causing problems for him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After a long search, Popatlal is found hiding in his closet. When questioned about his disappearance, he opens up about how overwhelmingly stressed and anxious he was feeling.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone feels pleased to see Popatlal's relaxed demeanour. A promising marriage prospect emerges for Popatlal.

subTitle: Popatlal becomes more impatient as he waits for Inspector Pandey to call and confirm whether his and the girl's horoscope matches.

subTitle: Popatlal decides to finally come clean with his potential bride and tell her everything honestly without knowing how she would react.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone in Gokuldham feels worried about Popatlal when Madhubala makes a decision about marrying him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal and his friends meet up with Madhubala's family to hear Madhubala's decision about her marriage.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone in Gokuldham is bursting with happiness and excitement. They make preparations for Popatlal's engagement.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Jethalal realises that business is rather slow, he immediately asks his staff to cut down on expenses.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal endures a rather depressing day in terms of business and is convinced that he needs good luck and positivity. He shares his ordeal with his friends in the society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal wakes up with the stern resolution to stay positive to attract good luck. So, he avoids getting angry at Bhide, Daya, Iyer, Bagha and many others.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal finally loses his temper when Bagha asks for leave. His anger grows when Bawri arrives at Gada Electronics.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is pleased that Bawri has agreed to visit his shop daily. Champaklal does not comply with Jethalal's thinking.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A business association receives a complaint against Jethalal, following which they summon him. Jethalal wonders about the reason for his summon.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal is impressed with Daya's diligence in managing household expenses. Madhavi convinces Bhide to let her go shopping for saris.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya tries to talk Jethalal into going to Goa for a family trip, with one of her friends tagging along.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Bhide feels angry on seeing Tapu Sena playing Holi and causing trouble, he yells at them to go home.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Iyer secretly makes a plan to take Babita to Mahabaleshwar on Holi. He confides in Daya and tells her his idea.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal also plans a trip to Mahabaleshwar on Holi after hearing about Iyer's idea to take Babita there.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya learns about the trip to Mahabaleshwar but finds it increasingly difficult to keep the news to herself.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is surprised to discover that Babita is no longer going to Mahabaleshwar as they had planned.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The Gokuldham residents are enjoying the Holi celebration. However, Jethalal is stuck in his flat and decides to escape through the balcony.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The Gada family learn about a robbery in their area and prepare to keep their valuables safe. Jethalal receives a large cash payment from a man dressed in shabby clothes.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A gang of chain snatchers rob Anjali's gold necklace, frightening the members of Gokuldham Society. Jethalal finds an innovative way to carry a large sum of cash home.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The gang of robbers choose Mohanlal as their next victim and fire their guns in the society when they get caught. When Jethalal learns about the incident, he rushes back home.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal worries about the large amount of cash in his house. Tapu and his friends prepare to protect Gokuldham from the robbers.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Taarak and Jethalal try to convince everyone to hire a security guard after several robberies, but they reject the idea.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal finally decides to hire a security guard for everyone's safety. Bhide eventually fires the guard, making Jethalal worried.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham experiences a frightening night when thieves rob Jethalal at gunpoint. The following day, Taarak introduces a new security guard to protect the community.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The new security guard proves his worth when another robber strikes Gokuldham. The women take action to enhance community safety.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu's friends and Gokuldham's women join forces to protect their community from criminals. The robbers find a chance to rob Jethalal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Disguised as repairmen, the thieves enter Jethalal's home. Their plan backfires when they learn that the real repairmen are already in the house.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The robbers threaten Daya, forcing Jethalal to surrender. As they flee, Tapu and his friends block their escape route.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu and his friends gets honoured and felicitated for their bravery. Everyone get invited to participate in an anti-tobacco campaign.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Iyer jokingly tells Jethalal to move out of Gokuldham and go back to his hometown. Upon hearing, Jethalal feels perplexed by his friends words.

subTitle: Being troubled by the current issues at work, Bagha decides to call Nattu Kaka to discuss their concerns.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal believes that he should confront Bagha and Nattu Kaka to settle their agreement once and for all, but he eventually runs into Babita and Iyer.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Iyer jokingly teases Jethalal by telling everyone to punish him for being late. Jethalal comes up with a revenge plan.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone in Gokuldham society agrees to host Holi with safety precautions. Tapu comes up with a plan to surprise his friends during the festival.

subTitle: As Gokuldam society prepares for Holi celebrations, Tapu and his friends introduce an exciting new game.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: During the Holi game, Tapu and his friends play a prank on the others. Madhavi becomes an unsuspecting victim of one of their tricks.
